title: Cobblemon Omnilith
description: Cobblemon Omnilith is a modpack made for the Cobblemon Omnilith server, a server which posesses a custom map and uses create cobblemon and decoration mods such as beautify to bring the community together!
body:
This modpack combines the best of Cobblemon, Create, and quality decoration mods like Beautify to deliver a vibrant and immersive Minecraft experience. Designed to foster a thriving, collaborative community, players can explore, build, and strategize together while enjoying the unique features of Pokémon-inspired gameplay and advanced automation and decoration options.

Whether you’re training your favorite Cobblemon, crafting intricate machines with Create, or designing stunning builds with Beautify, this modpack encourages teamwork, creativity, and growth. Our goal is to build a supportive environment where players flourish together sharing resources, collaborating on projects, and creating a lively, welcoming community.

Join us to experience a seamless blend of adventure, creativity, and social connection!
